description: Create packages/ecosystem-bridge - the cross-app integration layer that unifies all Quant apps with universal share sheet, cross-app notifications, unified activity feed, content embedding, universal profile, auth state sync, deep linking registry, shared content cache, and cross-app AI context. Also update scripts/test.js to validate all new packages.
steps: Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/types.ts - SharedContent, DeepLink, ActivityFeedItem, EmbedConfig, UniversalProfile, CrossAppEvent, CacheEntry, AIContext, etc.
Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/services/universal-share.ts - UniversalShareSheet: share(), getTargetApps(), formatForApp(), getPreview(), trackShare(), getShareAnalytics()
Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/services/cross-app-notifications.ts - CrossAppNotifications: notify(), routeToApp(), aggregate(), getUnifiedInbox(), setPreferences()
Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/services/activity-feed.ts - UnifiedActivityFeed: getFeed(), addActivity(), filterByApp(), filterByType(), markSeen(), getUnseenCount()
Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/services/content-embedding.ts - ContentEmbedding: embed(), getPreview(), resolveEmbed(), renderCard(), trackEngagement(), getSupported()
Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/services/universal-profile.ts - UniversalProfile: getProfile(), updateProfile(), syncAcrossApps(), getLinkedApps(), mergeProfiles(), getPublicCard()
Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/services/auth-state-sync.ts - AuthStateSync: syncLogin(), syncLogout(), getActiveSessions(), propagateTokenRefresh(), validateCrossApp()
Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/services/deep-linking.ts - DeepLinkRegistry: register(), resolve(), generateLink(), validateLink(), getAnalytics(), handleFallback()
Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/services/shared-cache.ts - SharedContentCache: get(), set(), preload(), invalidate(), getStats(), setPolicy(), warmCache()
Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/services/cross-app-ai-context.ts - CrossAppAIContext: getContext(), addContext(), getRelevantHistory(), summarizeActivity(), suggestActions()
Create packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/index.ts - Barrel export all ecosystem bridge modules
Update scripts/test.js to validate all new packages (analytics, notifications, search, media, payments, moderation, i18n, ecosystem-bridge) have src/index.ts
acceptance_criteria: packages/ecosystem-bridge/src/index.ts exists with exports for all 9 services
Each service has 200-400 lines of real cross-app integration logic
DeepLinkRegistry covers all 9 apps with proper URL schemes
UniversalProfile properly merges profiles from all Quant apps
scripts/test.js validates all 15 packages (7 original + 8 new)
Running node scripts/test.js passes with all packages validated
verification: Run: node scripts/test.js - should pass and report all 15 packages valid
findings: All 11 files created for ecosystem-bridge package (types + 9 services + index). Total 3942 lines of new code. Test runner updated to validate all 15 packages. All tests pass. 180K+ total lines in ecosystem.
